scripts.dev:stop: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$lock='.next/dev/lock'; if (Test-Path $lock) { $p=(Get-Content $lock | ConvertFrom-Json).pid; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run dev:stop && powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path .next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next }" && npm run dev
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start
